name: Prometheus Node Exporter
description: Rocky 8 with Docker running Prometheus node_exporter on port 9100 for metrics collection

commands.command: sudo dnf install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io
sudo systemctl enable docker && sudo systemctl start docker
sudo docker run -d --name node-exporter --restart always --net host --pid host -v /:/host:ro,rslave prom/node-exporter --path.rootfs=/host
